original_image_tags: A red stamp "ACTION COPY" with a smaller "PRIORITY" stamp overlapping the top right corner. Handwritten annotation in red ink above reads "13 Feb." with initials "S.H" below.
Handwritten numbers "655" appear above the text line "TIME ONE ONE FEBRUARY FOUR NINE".

elements.description: Typed classified message form containing a report of a UFO sighting. Text includes headers, sender 'FT PEPPERRELLI, NFLD', recipient 'CG AMC-ATTN MC1AXO DASH THREE', and a narrative describing a burning object observed on February 11, 1949, at 0655 local time. Visible handwritten annotations include '13 Feb. S.H', 'ACTION COPY', 'PL/INT', and 'X-0165'. Visible stamps include 'SECRET' (crossed out) at the top and bottom, and 'PRIORITY' near the top right.

judge.reason: Description B lists additional visual elements (e.g., 'SECRET' stamps, 'PL/INT' and 'X-0165' annotations) not mentioned in A, while A cites a 'TIME ONE ONE FEBRUARY FOUR NINE' text that B does not, creating contradictions in the specific quoted visual text.
